**1. Mathematical Equations:**

σ = standard deviation
σg = standard deviation of spatial deviation of fuel-air ratio (x)
σt = standard deviation of temporal deviation of fuel-air ratio (x)
x = fuel-air ratio
xmax = maximum fuel-air ratio over space or time
xmin = minimum fuel-air ratio over space or time
(x) = averaged fuel-air ratio over space or time
